# Agents

This folder should document available agents (browserAgent, restApiAgent, mySQLAgent, etc.). Each agent doc should follow the `ai/agent-template.md` structure and include YAML frontmatter.

Recommended fields in each `*.agent.md` frontmatter:

- `title`, `description`, `owner`, `tags`, `inputs`, `outputs`, `version`.

Example: see `browserAgent.agent.md` (or normalize using `agent-template.md`).
